title: Assemble a build prompt
description: A project owner or AI tool turns a Functional Build Specification into a single implementation prompt with the acceptance criteria and the architectural context the coding agent needs.
iWant: to turn a Functional Build Specification into a single implementation prompt
soThat: a coding agent has everything it needs to implement the slice, traceable to the acceptance criteria it must satisfy

acceptanceCriteria.description: Build assembly walks each AC in acIds to its parent user story and includes the Given/When/Then in the prompt
acceptanceCriteria.then: it walks each acceptance criterion in acIds to its parent user story and includes the criterion's Given/When/Then in the prompt

acceptanceCriteria.description: Build assembly walks the referenced TACs and ADRs and includes their relevant content in the prompt
acceptanceCriteria.given: an FBS that declares architectural context
acceptanceCriteria.then: it walks the referenced TACs and ADRs and includes their relevant content in the prompt

acceptanceCriteria.description: The assembled prompt is a single markdown document naming FBS, summary, approach, ACs and architectural context
acceptanceCriteria.then: it is a single markdown document naming the FBS, its summary and approach, the acceptance criteria, and the architectural context
